hyperedges.label: mz-select CSS, JS, and HTML form the complete mz-select component

nodes.label: Standalone Without Materialize
nodes.rationale: The component is designed to be autonomous — it styles a native select without requiring the full Materialize CSS framework, keeping the real <select> element so form submission and change events work natively.
